summary: Tested dark mode functionality across Landing, Auth, and Admin Dashboard pages. Fixed critical dark mode contrast issue in AdminDashboard.js where text in 'Contenido', 'Actividad Reciente', and 'Métricas de Conversión' sections was invisible due to hardcoded slate colors (bg-slate-50, text-slate-500, etc.) that don't adapt to dark mode.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.js had multiple hardcoded slate colors (bg-slate-50, text-slate-500, text-slate-400, bg-slate-100) that don't adapt to dark mode - FIXED by replacing with CSS variables (bg-secondary, text-muted-foreground, text-foreground)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Dark mode working correctly on all tested pages

landing_page.dark_mode_hero: PASS - Hero section has dark gradient background with light text
landing_page.navigation_buttons: PASS - Login and Signup buttons visible
landing_page.pricing_section: PASS - Pricing cards visible with proper contrast

auth_page.login_card: PASS - White card with proper contrast

admin_dashboard_dark_mode.localStorage_persistence: PASS - Theme saved as 'remy-theme' in localStorage
admin_dashboard_dark_mode.stat_cards: PASS - All stat cards visible with proper contrast
admin_dashboard_dark_mode.contenido_section: PASS - Cursos, Lecciones, Preguntas, Universidades, Preguntas Uni. all visible
admin_dashboard_dark_mode.actividad_reciente: PASS - Activity items visible with proper text contrast

bugs_fixed.issue: CRITICAL: Text invisible in dark mode in 'Contenido' section (Cursos, Lecciones, Preguntas, etc.)
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Hardcoded bg-slate-50 background with no explicit text color - text inherited dark color that was invisible on light background in dark mode
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed bg-slate-50 to bg-secondary and added text-foreground class to text elements

bugs_fixed.issue: Text invisible in 'Actividad Reciente' section in dark mode
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Same issue - hardcoded bg-slate-50 and text-slate-400/500 colors
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to bg-secondary, text-foreground, and text-muted-foreground

bugs_fixed.issue: Text invisible in 'Métricas de Conversión' section in dark mode
StatCard component colors not adapting to dark mode
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to bg-cyan-500/20 with dark: variants and text-muted-foreground

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark mode is now fully functional on Admin Dashboard. The student-facing pages (Simulacros, Biblioteca, TuUniversidad) were already updated in previous iterations to use CSS variables. The theme toggle in Layout.js works correctly and persists to localStorage. Note: Student pages require Google authentication to test - could not verify dark mode on those pages directly, but code review confirms they use proper CSS variables (text-foreground, bg-background, etc.).
